# Mosoo API

> Developer documentation for calling published Mosoo Agents. Coding agents should start with the machine-oriented guide, then use the raw OpenAPI JSON for strict schema validation.

## Start here

- [Coding agent guide](https://docs.mosoo.ai/coding-agents.md): Machine-oriented guide with API flow, authentication, error handling, examples, implementation guardrails, and the generated API contract.
- [Human quickstart](https://docs.mosoo.ai/quickstart.md): Human-oriented walkthrough for creating a Thread, sending events, and reading responses.
- [Authentication and access](https://docs.mosoo.ai/auth-and-access.md): API token usage and access requirements for published Agents.

## API specifications

- [English OpenAPI JSON](https://docs.mosoo.ai/mosoo-openapi.en.generated.json): Raw OpenAPI contract for client generation and strict request or response validation.
- [Simplified Chinese OpenAPI JSON](https://docs.mosoo.ai/mosoo-openapi.zh-Hans.generated.json): Localized OpenAPI contract for Simplified Chinese API reference pages.
- [Compatibility OpenAPI JSON](https://docs.mosoo.ai/mosoo-openapi.generated.json): English compatibility copy for older links and tooling.

## Public API endpoints

- `POST /api/v1/files/{fileId}/complete`: Complete Thread file upload
- `GET /api/v1/files/{fileId}/content`: Download Thread file content
- `PUT /api/v1/files/{fileId}/content`: Upload Thread file content
- `GET /api/v1/agents/{agentId}/threads`: List Threads for an Agent API Endpoint
- `POST /api/v1/agents/{agentId}/threads`: Create a Thread for an Agent API Endpoint
- `GET /api/v1/threads/{threadId}`: Retrieve Thread summary
- `DELETE /api/v1/threads/{threadId}`: Delete a Thread
- `POST /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/archive`: Archive a Thread
- `GET /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/events`: List Thread events
- `POST /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/events`: Send user messages, permission decisions, or interrupts to a Thread
- `GET /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/events/stream`: Stream Thread events
- `GET /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/files`: List Thread files
- `POST /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/files`: Add a Thread file
- `POST /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/files/uploads`: Create a Thread file upload
- `DELETE /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/files/{fileId}`: Remove a Thread file
- `POST /api/v1/threads/{threadId}/unarchive`: Unarchive a Thread

## Notes for agents

- Build app-side backend and product logic around the published Mosoo Agent running in Mosoo's sandbox; do not implement a replacement sandbox, Agent runtime, model loop, planner, tool runner, memory system, lifecycle manager, or provider integration.
- Treat Mosoo as a single-user integration surface unless the API contract says otherwise.
- Do not invent API tokens, Agent IDs, Thread IDs, file IDs, or run IDs.
- Prefer `coding-agents.md` for workflow and retry behavior.
- Prefer OpenAPI JSON for generated clients and exact schema validation.
